composition.Programmer 1: Fix and complete main.py to ensure all routes and functionalities are implemented correctly according to the requirements document. Specifically, fix the dashboard() function to resolve the TemplateNotFound error by ensuring the 'dashboard.html' template is correctly referenced and available in the templates directory. Also, verify and enhance other routes to fully support the eight pages described, including proper data loading, filtering, and rendering. Ensure the application starts from the Dashboard page as required.
composition.Programmer 2: Implement the 'dashboard.html' template file in the Flask app's templates directory. This template must fulfill the Dashboard Page requirements  display featured movies, upcoming releases, and provide quick navigation buttons with the specified element IDs (dashboard-page, featured-movies, browse-movies-button, view-bookings-button, showtimes-button). The template should be designed to integrate seamlessly with the existing Flask backend and support dynamic content rendering as per the data provided by main.py.
